reasoning: The document meets the threshold for automatic approval with a fidelity composite score of 0.8881 and near-perfect programmatic shingling recall of 0.995. While three minor concerns were identified regarding the summarization of infographics and a timeline, the high signal agreement and scoring band (>0.85) trigger the directive for AUTO_APPROVE despite these minor factual misalignments in the reformatted content.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: While the timeline graphic on page 2 is represented by a summary table, significant specific information is omitted. The milestones for 2019 ('On-the-ground canvassing where necessary') and 2021 ('April 1: Release Redistricting Summary Files [P.L. 94-171]') are completely missing. Other details like 'award major contracts' (2016), 'on-the-ground interviews begin' (2020), and 'apportionment' (2021) are also lost in the summarization. These omissions exceed the acceptable threshold for a content s
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The timeline on Page 2 includes milestones: '2019: On-the-ground canvassing where necessary' and '2021: April 1: Release Redistricting Summary Files [P.L. 94-171]'.
concerns.output_quote: The summary table representing this timeline (caption: 'Timeline of Census Preparation Activities') omits these milestones entirely.
concerns.location: Page 2, Preparing for the Census – We Have Work To Do!, timeline graphic (converted to table index 0)

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: The summary table for the timeline has several temporal misalignments. Activities listed in the source for 2016 ('Develop and award major contracts...') are grouped under the '2017 - 2018' column. Activities for 2018 ('Conduct end-to-end systems test') are grouped under the '2019 - 2021' column. This alters the factual schedule of the government operations described.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: 2016: Develop and award major contracts...; 2018: Conduct end-to-end systems test.
concerns.output_quote: The output table lists 'Develop systems' under the '2017 - 2018' column and 'Conduct tests' under the '2019 - 2021' column.
concerns.location: Page 2, Preparing for the Census – We Have Work To Do!, timeline graphic (converted to table index 0)

concerns.analysis: While decorative elements and some logos are present, a major meaningful infographic on the second page of the PDF is missing from the HTML output. This infographic is a diagram showing how five programs (LUCA, SDRP, PSAP, GSS, BAS) feed into a process funnel to result in 'Correct addresses', 'Correct boundaries', and 'Correct streets'. This graphic provides essential context for understanding the relationship between the programs described in the subsequent text blocks.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Infographic on page 2 showing a funnel with inputs from LUCA, SDRP, PSAP, GSS, and BAS programs leading to 'Correct addresses', 'Correct boundaries', and 'Correct streets'.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML content following the timeline table contains only text sections; the visual diagrammatic representation of program integration is entirely absent.
concerns.location: Page 2, right-hand side of the source PDF.
